banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: A pre-1999 old-law Class 3 licence holder, born before 1953 (so his Anlage 8e FeV deadline is 19 January 2033), exchanging his 1970 licence for the EU card format and electing to keep the extended >12t towing combination past age 50, without requesting Class T and without needing a record transcript from another authority.

collectedValues.label: Home address — street and house number (Straße)
Home address — postal code and city (PLZ/Ort)
Are you exchanging a Class 3 licence issued before 1 January 1999?
collectedValues.sourceRef: 'Als Inhaber(in) der alten Fahrerlaubnisklasse 3 beantrage ich zudem folgende Fahrerlaubnisklassen:'

collectedValues.label: Do you want to keep the extended >12t–18.5t towing combination previously included in Class 3?
collectedValues.sourceRef: 'Ich beantrage die bisher in der alten Fahrerlaubnisklasse 3 enthaltene Zugkombination über 12 t bis 18,5 t ...'

collectedValues.label: Do you request Class T (agricultural and forestry vehicles)?
collectedValues.sourceRef: not applicable — applicant is not active in agriculture or forestry

collectedValues.label: Was your current licence issued by an authority other than your present Fahrerlaubnisbehörde?
collectedValues.sourceRef: not applicable — Landratsamt Ludwigsburg remains the applicant's present Fahrerlaubnisbehörde

collectedValues.label: How should the new licence be provided?
collectedValues.sourceRef: 'neuer EU-Kartenführerschein wird in der Fahrerlaubnisbehörde ... abgeholt.'

requiredDocuments.label: Valid proof of identity (Personalausweis or Reisepass) or an official record of date and place of birth
requiredDocuments.sourceRef: 'ein amtlicher Nachweis über Ort und Tag der Geburt (Personalausweis oder Reisepass)'

requiredDocuments.label: The current driving licence being exchanged
requiredDocuments.sourceRef: Bundesregierung FAQ — required documents for the exchange

requiredDocuments.label: Karteikartenabschrift (driving-licence record transcript) from the original issuing authority
Medical fitness certificate, Anlage 5 Nr. 1 FeV (after age 50)
requiredDocuments.sourceRef: required because requestsExtendedTowingCombination is true and the applicant has passed age 50

requiredDocuments.label: Vision test certificate, Anlage 6 Nr. 2 FeV (after age 50)
requiredDocuments.sourceRef: required because requestsExtendedTowingCombination is true and the applicant has passed age 50

requiredDocuments.label: Proof of activity in agriculture or forestry
Exchange fee, approximately 25 EUR
requiredDocuments.sourceRef: 'Nach der Gebührenordnung für Maßnahmen im Straßenverkehr ... eine Gebühr von 24,00 Euro'

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (de/kba/driving-licence-mandatory-exchange). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to any Fahrerlaubnisbehörde, the KBA, or any government system, and every identifier above (name, address, phone, email, licence number) is a fabricated example, not a real person's record. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and submit the request through their own local Fahrerlaubnisbehörde's channel before this application is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
